name: Keith Ellison
subject: re: Trump and his billionaire pals
body:
Stand with Democrats against Trump's new budget.
---
**Help stop Donald Trump's assault on working Americans. Say you'll fight to elect Democrats who will stand up to the Trump agenda:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170525_ke_v1s3&source=em_20170525_ke_v1s3")**

Friend --

Trump's proposed budget confirms something we already knew before he took office: you can't believe anything that comes out of his mouth.

His budget cuts $193 billion from social programs like SNAP, which feeds 44 million people. It takes $800 billion from Medicaid, leaving 10 million people without care, and cuts $9 billion from education.

Under Trump's budget, the most vulnerable Americans are left to fend for themselves, and millionaires and billionaires will get big tax cuts.

So when Donald promised over and over to make America great again, he really meant just for himself and his billionaire pals -- they'll get richer at the expense of working people and the middle class.

We need to build an economy that works for every American. We need to guarantee access to health care as a right for every American, not just the privileged few, and we need to make sure that every person in this country can get the education they need to get a leg up. And to do that, we've got to send more Democrats to Congress.

**So, I'm asking you now to add your name and say you'll help elect Democrats who will fight Trump's dangerous agenda. Stand with Democrats who will fight to make sure every American has a chance to get ahead, not just Donald and his wealthy friends:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170525_ke_v1s3&source=em_20170525_ke_v1s3")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ced3/4067b0a/28a940436/7e762991/1430490872/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170525_ke_v1s3&source=em_20170525_ke_v1s3"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ced3/4067b0a/28a940436/7e76299e/1430490872/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170525_ke_v1s3&source=em_20170525_ke_v1s3"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ced3/4067b0a/28a940436/7e76299f/1430490872/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170525_ke_v1s3&source=em_20170525_ke_v1s3") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ced3/4067b0a/28a940436/7e76299c/1430490872/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170525_ke_v1s3&source=em_20170525_ke_v1s3"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

subject: Special Election: VOTE TODAY!

body:

Today is Election Day in Montana. _Have you voted, Friend?_

Polls are open today from 7:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m., so please make sure you Get Out and Vote and check with your friends and neighbors as well!

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Doubt
body:
#
Team --
I was first elected to public office almost 15 years ago and I know a little bit of something about people who doubt your abilities, who constantly remind you of what you can't do, and where you don't come from.
There were people almost 15 years ago who believed that I couldn't win an election because I didn't come from money or a famous family, that even though I was willing to work hard, that I would never have a chance. There are people who still believe that public office should be exclusive to those who come from great privilege, and that the rest of us just shouldn't even try.
And this is a problem that is bigger than any one campaign or candidate, because this is the kind of attitude that discourages our young people from trying, from believing in themselves, from breaking out of the cycle of poverty. This is the kind of attitude that keeps us stagnant.
This governor's race is about changing the face of Florida, but it's also about the opportunity to inspire hope and encouragement and inspiration for our young people. And that's why it's critical that we leave no doubt.
**[Contribute to our campaign today, and help us rebuild Florida into a state with hope and opportunity for all.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3321/9e00690/4bb99328/24037032/2838947170/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170525-resenddoubt")**
We can do better in this state -- I firmly believe that -- but we can only do better if we're willing to work for it, to give it all we've got. I don't mind going anywhere and competing with everything that God has given me to compete with. I'm just hoping that includes you -- because I know that if we are all committed to doing better in this state together, then we will win.
**Together, we will leave no doubt.**
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3321/9e00690/4bb99328/24037032/2838947170/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170525-resenddoubt")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3321/9e00690/4bb99328/24037035/2838947170/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3321/9e00690/4bb99328/24037034/2838947170/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3321/9e00690/4bb99328/24037037/2838947170/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Watch our campaign's second TV ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Watch "More Than Talk" Online
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Peter,
Our campaign just launched our second TV ad, entitled "More Than Talk."
You can [watch it online here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFmcmpmu8t8gR32VWG6WXGEcwQRTip85uDUUMi4QhbstYHnKn5iWYN1I_JaXj5oY4qEoAJlShzuUCVm5CP2Bq_vPtJFKDTNLb26fQ4SVbhl-J4gAvbQ43FKWMYPwF-EGwfLqlDKaXig2_kurJ8VeizU7TcR7FalQrP&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==).

For more than a year, I have been traveling across Virginia running on a proven record of conservative results.
I need your help to continue sharing this message before the June 13th primary.
One of our donors has generously agreed to match all contributions, dollar for dollar, up to $15,000, through May 27th. If you [contribute $250, $100, or even $50 to help keep this ad on the air](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFBhN65AaqmOg1cyUpauTDDZCmXNtEE6SiTuHGz7KX9AP8TASAj7BlFbLdlCuynWbKoiuJUidojCiSpzcPqFp7E5K0VMRGubA-WCNyfyPNB9SgiCqR6FYOtBC96N9WsEjrkbLsNRuWLaCsuyQQzI_yeQaQQ761QMMaApIZY0M3RSffsLq7l9Nf2A==&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==) your dollars will go twice as far!

---

---
| | | [Contribute $250 for TV](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFVPiyd4-0Nt2m8JXksU4kdMC_T_zLoXQLPt6__tZIINVtSfaeJRAcLFSsLMiOHkRTR58HtjxQWaNz_v_pK891vw1FM-D2FjpcvbkjB6BhwbwX8-VV3Tj-WKYNOwi0c_NzaH02IeOk7PRrsbv-qMFLwMNZxxMRzrlT5Kq0M1s2gAB0KnnXhn-CQ_O9gHH0HjMC&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==)
---
| | | [Contribute $100 for TV](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFM7tiH7Pr_u__wMU-9uX99tNHekmuLE0AweXnLW7EWkJo_QF8jOJ5aJtyRQoFMEsknFYLOWROYyYkv065WIau-sJC3mTdUEzdSa69xOa-qHGeNKUzfUHDfOtahNzW39ScuAr_oPmK6v5Rc4kML1iZn963w9G_A3-e58SO8STwRA3pmZJROe-JGZY9ltinKgbD&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==)

| | | [Contribute Another Amount](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFBhN65AaqmOg1cyUpauTDDZCmXNtEE6SiTuHGz7KX9AP8TASAj7BlFbLdlCuynWbKoiuJUidojCiSpzcPqFp7E5K0VMRGubA-WCNyfyPNB9SgiCqR6FYOtBC96N9WsEjrkbLsNRuWLaCsuyQQzI_yeQaQQ761QMMaApIZY0M3RSffsLq7l9Nf2A==&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==)
---
| Election Day is just 19 days away. I would greatly appreciate your help in these closing days, whether you would like to [make a matched contribution](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFBhN65AaqmOg1cyUpauTDDZCmXNtEE6SiTuHGz7KX9AP8TASAj7BlFbLdlCuynWbKoiuJUidojCiSpzcPqFp7E5K0VMRGubA-WCNyfyPNB9SgiCqR6FYOtBC96N9WsEjrkbLsNRuWLaCsuyQQzI_yeQaQQ761QMMaApIZY0M3RSffsLq7l9Nf2A==&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==) to keep our ad on TV or [volunteer for our campaign](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX4GgKl6uT98vR_TnbKxZNpImQ1ADzTIomo0c0resbs3jc4d24f4X9wV4dKbN-rJh9fVnr7YDF-9Ug5l4k2LB3tF2zpZe31MspEgtHbSrx4K-QcYdX1zotaM=&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==) to help us win at the grassroots level.
If you think you might need an absentee ballot, please visit [VogelForVirginia.com/absentee](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFMDSLngP7VEf-mCHiC9BOQqezz77qAzFyQwR5RETmHdoqOSqVDqx4GhBvULA3lnh0UOk30P-JMX7DkEOK3UX7zZ09cXo_kZCZtsj9iBEHG9M=&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==) to learn more about who qualifies and how easy it is to vote absentee.
Sincerely,

---
|
---
|

---
| Jill Vogel
P. S. Would you help us close strong by [sending in a donation right now](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aKL_9Qwk1I_ETcV9AhpN8Hikq51t_RBAFIpno0LYaXDjdRSLrAAhX1_Pl50SQANFBhN65AaqmOg1cyUpauTDDZCmXNtEE6SiTuHGz7KX9AP8TASAj7BlFbLdlCuynWbKoiuJUidojCiSpzcPqFp7E5K0VMRGubA-WCNyfyPNB9SgiCqR6FYOtBC96N9WsEjrkbLsNRuWLaCsuyQQzI_yeQaQQ761QMMaApIZY0M3RSffsLq7l9Nf2A==&c=cjpPhufToHvbCyvZU1Oj205KS7C6F2L5rW1Y9NP3uk_0ftdqnfd_TQ==&ch=hAHT9X1lqeZWcSAQprh1od221rLeNz8_9yRZBrli6B-iNFB9vYSqXQ==)? Our team is watching our budget carefully and we want to make sure we have enough resources to reach every media market on every day from now until the election. Your contribution is very much appreciated and the sooner we can plan, the better.

---
| |

For more than a year, I have been traveling across Virginia running on a proven record of conservative results. I need your help to continue sharing this message before the June 13th primary. One of our donors has generously agreed to match all contributions, dollar for dollar, up to $15,000, through May 27th. If you == your dollars will go twice as far! | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Election Day is just 19 days away. I would greatly appreciate your help in these closing days, whether you would like to == to keep our ad on TV or == to help us win at the grassroots level. If you think you might need an absentee ballot, please visit == to learn more about who qualifies and how easy it is to vote absentee. Sincerely, | | | Jill Vogel P. S. Would you help us close strong by ==? Our team is watching our budget carefully and we want to make sure we have enough resources to reach every media market on every day from now until the election. Your contribution is very much appreciated and the sooner we can plan, the better. | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == | | | Vogel for Virginia | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@vogelforvirginia.com in collaboration with |

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: A little help?
body:
Derek,

Republican members of the House Election Law Committee have
authored an Op-Ed asking to close of the domicile loophole in the
state’s election law.

We encourage you to read it. ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbXjy0pN-2Fm3IKfxfZGIFDRgs0G-2Biix2eznoxctZ4L0xeyKvJMN4D5WAiy3OarCT3V1XEcLQFxN5wSsMKjGOoIejg-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mv7RYUJ9KXPdRPB1DgMutxCcvRDrWCDHikXC3hf2NGFY3d0Worxv3CadmJXELbCHMxouMjJ9YxOuVp6Y-2Bf3T28xXg-2Fndrpa6LJ5YTygW0bKQpNGf981I01nqU4-2Bf8-2FIude-2BTO55jsEr78eNQSeg3qviB81AfvWLp7ufZ-2BQxX4teva8-2FmoZFtYA-2FQx35tq2xFd4rvqmRRqFnfzKCS0vFcZIxrU6O-2FK7RiyLOe1r67n2rCN28ImiIginbjD53gMAwb2vDkLmxMYwKcNitxpvOzlPQ-3D-3D )

Could you do us a favor? Please share Rep. Yvonne Dean-Bailey’s
Facebook post ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyLevWi0EUiAVZpY931uXQ2vRCfOKEeLsV3xhl0Jyk5sj_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mv7RYUJ9KXPdRPB1DgMutxCcvRDrWCDHikXC3hf2NGFY3d0Worxv3CadmJXELbCHMxouMjJ9YxOuVp6Y-2Bf3T287ofECSRQIJp55ITgHrJZxBs9XN-2F5ZenVUSNHGFAetXn3nAGdE9xCexdcVBogirnhMIwkMOmvy1bqwudqLiD1WwyBThklib3OvVj3EpinSXLXlhKKGjeVguE2gIXLlMVBXMqu-2F1XmtNaaYVj8V8hNnf4sgh1Lp7JfEl4-2Ft0dWaxShunKPMhFCysiNyLn-2FrVYJQ-3D-3D ) and
retweet her Tweet ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyOgmNjy-2BL5tnKJI8FBmZnip8mShCAZULn18US6kU2CZv_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mv7RYUJ9KXPdRPB1DgMutxCcvRDrWCDHikXC3hf2NGFY3d0Worxv3CadmJXELbCHMxouMjJ9YxOuVp6Y-2Bf3T28yyLD4DtPXiD3LG9JU1APZINZWvHqW772BCNMT89Zddt7ibUa0uBo-2B5DQAT33YKMzKXfqCP0dVeWSI6uT0EDEzLuYI-2BOFgTac919RHRVZMa-2BA2OuUXlmkBpYdXvmbsGgQdV-2Fz3CA2ETn3fS2u0xEAoXZaZzD2F-2F0nmYVE6NJRDjuCK6a-2BZnSHk-2FPB6dU9dJg2Q-3D-3D ).

We need your help to spread the word that New Hampshire’s
election law has a big domicile loophole, and SB3 is the solution
to close it.

Thank you,

Jeanie Forrester
Chairman

google analytics
clean_body: Derek, Republican members of the House Election Law Committee have authored an Op-Ed asking to close of the domicile loophole in the state’s election law. We encourage you to read it. ( ) Could you do us a favor? Please share Rep. Yvonne Dean-Bailey’s Facebook post ( ) and retweet her Tweet ( ). We need your help to spread the word that New Hampshire’s election law has a big domicile loophole, and SB3 is the solution to close it. Thank you, Jeanie Forrester Chairman Share your Robly campaign on Facebook ( ) Share your Robly campaign on Twitter ( ) footer image

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
Greg for Montana

Friend, tonight we won a victory for all Montanans

Friend,

Tonight is about you. Tonight is your victory.

Over the last 2 years, you have knocked on tens of thousands of
doors. You have made hundreds of thousands of phone calls. Susan
and I have traveled over 80 thousand miles across Montana, to all
56 counties, multiple times. And together - tonight - we won a
victory for our Treasure State.

Tonight we won a victory for all Montanans.

Tonight Montanans sent a wake up call to the Washington DC
Establishment.
Montanans said Bernie Sanders and Nancy Pelosi can't call the
shots in Montana. Montanans said we need to drain the swamp.

...and we have a lot of work to do.

Hard work is the way we get things done and sometimes hard work
is born out of hard lessons.

Last night I learned a lesson. When you make a mistake, you have
to own up to it. That's the Montana way.

Last night I did make a mistake. I took an action that I cannot
take back. I am not proud of what happened.I should not have
responded the way that I did.

And for that I am sorry.

I should not have treated the reporter that way. I am sorry Mr.
Ben Jacobs... I want to apologize to the FOX News team, and I am
sorry to each of you for my actions.

That is not the person I am or the leader I will be for Montana.

Rest assured - our work is just beginning - but it does begin
with me taking responsibility for my own actions.

You deserve a Congressman who stays out of the limelight and just
gets the job done.

I promise to work hard to protect our precious Montana way of
life. I promise to be open and accessible.

I'm going to Washington to get things done, to drain the swamp,
to fight for Montana families.

I will bring accountability to Washington, D.C.. I'll support
term limits and banning members of Congress from becoming
lobbyists. And, I'll hold the politicians accountable-if they
can't balance the budget, they shouldn't get paid.

Washington won't like this but it's time America and Montana come
first again.

You have always been on my side and I pledge I'll always be on
your side.

Montana sent a strong message tonight that you want a Congressman
who will work with President Trump to Make America and Montana
Great Again.

I feel a deep sense of obligation and duty to this great state
where Susan and I raised our family and built our business.

Thank you for your support and this opportunity to serve. God
Bless Montana and the United States of America.

Sincerely,

Greg Gianforte

Paid for by Greg for Montana

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 17, 2017.

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: lives literally depend on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea4/2a380d31/1a94a513/fe8947/1306628435/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea4/2a380d31/1a94a513/fe8947/1306628435/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
This is pretty shocking, everyone.
When Washington Republicans rammed Trumpcare through the House, we knew it was a reckless, partisan bill that offers tax breaks to corporate special interests at the expense of hard-working Americans.
Now, we know just how devastating it is:
**Yesterday, the non-partisan Congressional Business Office announced that if this bill becomes law, 23 MILLION people could lose their coverage. That's almost 18x the population of New Hampshire.**
That's 23 million people who could have to choose between putting food on the table or footing a medical bill.
**If this makes your blood boil like it does ours, we have to get on our feet and make our voices heard.[Join thousands of grassroots supporters from across the country and add your name to tell Congressional Republicans that _all_ Americans deserve access to quality care, not just billionaires.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea4/2a380d31/1a94a513/fe8940/1306628435/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170525_CBO_nd?source=e20170525_CBO1_nd&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
With Republicans in control of both the White House and Congress, they're closer than they've ever been to repealing the Affordable Care Act and ripping away health insurance from millions of people.
The ONLY way to keep that from happening is to keep doing what we've been doing since the Trump administration took over -- resist.
[**Sign now to tell Washington Republicans that we won't stand for their attempts to pass a healthcare plan that hurts 23 MILLION of us while giving tax breaks to corporate special interests.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea4/2a380d31/1a94a513/fe8940/1306628435/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170525_CBO_nd?source=e20170525_CBO1_nd&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thanks for being active in this critically important fight -- lives literally depend on it.
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdea4/2a380d31/1a94a513/fe8941/1306628435/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA1X3RydW1wY2FyZS1jYm8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDUyNV9DQk8xX25kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201705_trumpcare-cbo?refcode=e20170525_CBO1_nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
